_comment: Fixed 2026-07-19: (1) weighted_list is now DERIVED from each pin's own 'weight' field in the shard files (source of truth), not hand-maintained -- previously listings 30-33 (20 pins) were silently missing their 3x rotation boost, a latent bug invisible because nothing had ever run the scheduler. (2) weighted_list is built as successive PASSES over the pool (not grouped repeats) so a stateless day-index walk never lands on the same image on consecutive days -- the original grouped-repeat construction would have posted the identical image 3 days running for every weight-3 pin, defeating the whole point of the fresh-pin variant system. See tools/pick_daily_pin.py. (3) buffer_board_map/buffer_pin_subprofile removed: vestigial from an earlier design, unused by the live pinterest_create_pin posting pipeline. | UPDATED 2026-07-19 (fold-in-the-12 project): added shards 10-11 (60 pin entries: 12 new holiday/back-to-school SKUs x 5 variants each), all weight 3 (newest-listings boost, same pattern as listings 21-34). v1 entries for these 12 reference their already-live Pinterest CDN image directly via an optional per-pin 'image_url' field rather than a repo-hosted file -- see pick_daily_pin.py. weighted_list regenerated accordingly (now length 490, was 310).
weighted_list_derived_from: per-pin 'weight' field in pinterest_shard_00.json..pinterest_shard_11.json, arranged as successive passes by tools/pick_daily_pin.py:build_weighted_list() -- regenerate via that function any time weights change, do not hand-edit this array
shard_size: variable (17 for shards 00-09, 30 for shards 10-11 -- not uniform since 2026-07-19)
rotation_algorithm: day_index = (calendar date - rotation_epoch).days; selection_index = day_index % len(weighted_list); pin = pool[weighted_list[selection_index]]. Stateless by design -- same date always yields the same pin (safe to re-fire), full pool cycles (310 days) before any repeat, min 60-day gap between repeats of the same weight-3 pin. Implemented in tools/pick_daily_pin.py.
